seoTitle: How to Apply for Financial Aid on Coursera
metaDescription: Apply for financial aid on Coursera to study courses for free, with the application steps, required information, and tips to strengthen your request.
intro: Financial aid on Coursera can open access to courses that would otherwise be out of budget, but the application needs to be filled out carefully to succeed. This walks through the application process, what information you'll need, and tips to improve your chances of approval.

steps.heading: Find the financial aid option on a course
steps.body: Go to the course page for the one you want to take and look for the financial aid application link.

steps.heading: Fill out the application
steps.body: Provide the requested information explaining your financial situation and reason for requesting aid.

steps.heading: Submit your request
steps.body: Review your answers and submit the application for Coursera to consider.

steps.heading: Wait for a decision and plan accordingly
steps.body: Coursera will review your application, so give it time before assuming you need to pay for the course another way.

faq.question: What information do I need for a financial aid application?
faq.answer: You'll generally need to explain your financial situation and why you're requesting aid for the specific course.

faq.question: How long does it take to hear back about financial aid?
faq.answer: Review times can vary, so it's worth applying with enough lead time before you want to start the course.

faq.question: What are common mistakes that hurt a financial aid application?
faq.answer: Being vague or incomplete in your responses is a common pitfall, so take time to explain your situation clearly.

faq.question: Can working professionals apply for financial aid too?
faq.answer: Yes, financial aid isn't limited to full-time students; professionals looking to upskill can apply as well.
